title: Extension popup UI (connect/disconnect/status)
description: Build the popup UI: host input, token input, PSK configuration (stored in chrome.storage.local), connect/disconnect button, connection status display, encryption status badge, error messages. Popup recovers state from chrome.storage.session on reopen.
acceptanceCriteria: Popup displays host input field (default: cowork.bmobot.ai)
Popup displays token input field (password type)
Settings section for PSK (stored in chrome.storage.local, persists across sessions)
Status area shows: disconnected / connecting / connected (encrypted)
Error messages displayed clearly on auth/handshake failure
Badge icon reflects state: gray (off), green (connected+encrypted), red (error)
Popup state recovered from chrome.storage.session on reopen
Token stored in chrome.storage.session (cleared on browser close)
